advanced_recharge.name: Advanced Recharge
advanced_recharge.desc: Instantly restores 70% of your mana bar.

aegis_stance.name: Aegis Stance
aegis_stance.desc: Raises the shield on all sides, doubling defense briefly.

agility.name: Agility
agility.desc: Blesses your legs, increasing cast and attack speed.

aqua_swirl.name: Aqua Swirl
aqua_swirl.desc: Creates a water vortex that strikes the enemy.

arcane_guard.name: Arcane Guard
arcane_guard.desc: Weave a light ward. Increases Defense by 15% for a short time.

armor_crush.name: Armor Crush
armor_crush.desc: Shatters the enemy’s armor, drastically lowering defense.

arrest.name: Arrest
arrest.desc: Holy magic pins the monster to the ground (same idea as Dryad Root).

aura_burn.name: Aura Burn
aura_burn.desc: Burn the target with an energy blast.

backstab.name: Backstab
backstab.desc: Sneak attack with extremely high damage.

battle_focus.name: Battle Focus
battle_focus.desc: Sharpen your stance. Increases Attack by 12% for a short time.

bison_spirit_totem.name: Bison Spirit Totem
bison_spirit_totem.desc: Bison fury! Absurdly raises attack when HP drops below 30%.

blazing_circle.name: Blazing Circle
blazing_circle.desc: A ring of fire expands, burning ALL monsters.

blinding_blow.name: Blinding Blow
blinding_blow.desc: Fast strike that disorients the enemy.

bounty_luck.name: Bounty Luck
bounty_luck.desc: Raises attack and accuracy, guided by greed.

burst_shot.name: Burst Shot
burst_shot.desc: Fires an explosive arrow hitting multiple enemies in the area.

chant_of_battle.name: Chant of Battle
chant_of_battle.desc: Shamanic chant that raises combat power.

chant_of_fire.name: Chant of Fire
chant_of_fire.desc: Greatly raises M. Def. and P. Def.

chant_of_fury.name: Chant of Fury
chant_of_fury.desc: Absurdly raises attack and cast speed.

chant_of_vampire.name: Chant of Vampire
chant_of_vampire.desc: Advanced life drain. Destructive damage that restores lots of HP.

concentration.name: Concentration
concentration.desc: Raises resistance to stop cast interruption.

corpse_burst.name: Corpse Burst
corpse_burst.desc: Profane magic: dark energy explosion hitting all enemies.

crippling_blow.name: Crippling Blow
crippling_blow.desc: Strike to the joints that shatters the enemy’s defense.

curse_gloom.name: Curse Gloom
curse_gloom.desc: Shadow curse that corrodes 30% of the enemy’s defense.

dance_of_fire.name: Dance of Fire
dance_of_fire.desc: Dance that multiplies strength and crit damage.

dance_of_warrior.name: Dance of Warrior
dance_of_warrior.desc: Dance that massively increases P. Atk.

dark_strike.name: Dark Strike
dark_strike.desc: A heavy blow imbued with dark magic.

dead_eye.name: Dead Eye
dead_eye.desc: Total focus that absurdly multiplies bow damage.

deadly_blow.name: Deadly Blow
deadly_blow.desc: Deadly strike that finds the enemy’s weak point.

death_shot.name: Death Shot
death_shot.desc: The arrow of annihilation. Devastating damage.

death_spike.name: Death Spike
death_spike.desc: Hurls a cursed piercing bone at the target.

deflect_arrow.name: Deflect Arrow
deflect_arrow.desc: Raises P. Def. against ranged and melee attacks.

divine_flash.name: Divine Flash
divine_flash.desc: Fires pure light energy at the enemy.

double_shot.name: Double Shot
double_shot.desc: Fires two arrows in a row with lethal precision.

dreaming_spirit.name: Dreaming Spirit
dreaming_spirit.desc: Puts the enemy in a deep trance, rooting them in place.

dryad_root.name: Dryad Root
dryad_root.desc: Pins the monster with magic roots, slowing attacks.

earthquake.name: Earthquake
earthquake.desc: Slams the weapon into the ground, causing an earthquake that wipes multiple enemies.

elemental_heal.name: Elemental Heal
elemental_heal.desc: Quickly heals wounds with nature magic (30% HP).

entangle.name: Entangle
entangle.desc: Tangles the enemy’s feet in vines, lowering defense and speed.

fake_death.name: Fake Death
fake_death.desc: Play dead to drop monsters’ aggro.

fatal_counter.name: Fatal Counter
fatal_counter.desc: Desperate attack of extreme physical power.

fatal_strike.name: Fatal Strike
fatal_strike.desc: Lethal strike that cleaves the target’s armor.

firm_strike.name: Firm Strike
firm_strike.desc: A steady follow-up blow. Reliable early physical damage.

flame_strike.name: Flame Strike
flame_strike.desc: Rain of fire on all monsters.

focus_death.name: Focus Death
focus_death.desc: Lethal focus. Massively increases all your attack power.

focused_force.name: Focused Force
focused_force.desc: Channels Ki (life energy) to boost the next strikes’ damage.

force_buster.name: Force Buster
force_buster.desc: Releases a Ki blast hitting all enemies around you.

force_of_destruction.name: Force of Destruction
force_of_destruction.desc: Final strike of orc martial arts. Massive single-target damage.

freezing_flame.name: Freezing Flame
freezing_flame.desc: Mystic fire that burns the target’s spirit.

freezing_strike.name: Freezing Strike
freezing_strike.desc: Freezes the enemy, drastically lowering attack power.

frenzy.name: Frenzy
frenzy.desc: Blind rage! Multiplies attack (colossal damage if HP is below 30%).

frost_flame.name: Frost Flame
frost_flame.desc: Freezing fire that corrodes and breaks physical and magic defense.

frost_wall.name: Frost Wall
frost_wall.desc: Raises an ice wall that explodes, hitting multiple enemies.

greater_heal.name: Greater Heal
greater_heal.desc: Powerful divine heal that restores 60% of your HP.

guts.name: Guts
guts.desc: Survival instinct. Multiplies P. Def. to absurd levels.

hammer_crush.name: Hammer Crush
hammer_crush.desc: Heavy axe or hammer swing. High chance to stun the enemy.

hex.name: Hex
hex.desc: Curse that shatters the enemy’s armor.

holy_armor.name: Holy Armor
holy_armor.desc: Blesses your armor, raising physical defense.

holy_strike.name: Holy Strike
holy_strike.desc: Smash the foe with holy power.

hurricane_assault.name: Hurricane Assault
hurricane_assault.desc: Devastating flurry of punches at hurricane speed.

hydro_blast.name: Hydro Blast
hydro_blast.desc: Fires a jet of extremely high-pressure water.

ice_strike.name: Ice Strike
ice_strike.desc: Cutting attack imbued with ice magic.

ice_vortex.name: Ice Vortex
ice_vortex.desc: Absolute-zero vortex that freezes and annihilates the target.

lethal_blow.name: Lethal Blow
lethal_blow.desc: The winds’ ultimate strike. Catastrophic physical damage.

lethal_shot.name: Lethal Shot
lethal_shot.desc: A lethal shot to the target’s vitals.

light_heal.name: Light Heal
light_heal.desc: Uses divine magic to heal 30% of your HP.

lightning_strike.name: Lightning Strike
lightning_strike.desc: Summons devastating black lightning to punish the enemy.

lionheart.name: Lionheart
lionheart.desc: Lion heart. Ignores fear and raises resist and P. Def.

magnus_chant.name: Magnus' Chant
magnus_chant.desc: [Doomcryer Lvl 76] Final chant. Multiplies all stats to the extreme.

major_heal.name: Major Heal
major_heal.desc: Advanced sacred heal. Restores 80% of max HP.

might.name: Might
might.desc: Blesses the target, increasing P. Atk.

might_of_heaven.name: Might of Heaven
might_of_heaven.desc: Calls down a pillar of divine light dealing severe damage.

miracle.name: Miracle
miracle.desc: The ultimate miracle. Restores 100% HP instantly.

mortal_blow.name: Mortal Blow
mortal_blow.desc: Fatal dagger strike dealing heavy damage.

ogre_spirit_totem.name: Ogre Spirit Totem
ogre_spirit_totem.desc: Embodies the ogre, gaining crushing physical defense.

pa_agrian_gift.name: Pa'agrian Gift
pa_agrian_gift.desc: Blesses your armor with Pa’agrio’s fire resistance.

poison_arrow.name: Poison Arrow
poison_arrow.desc: Fires a toxic arrow that poisons the target, draining HP over time.

poison_dance.name: Poison Dance
poison_dance.desc: Toxic dance that weakens the target’s defense.

power_smash.name: Power Smash
power_smash.desc: Crushing weapon strike focused on raw physical force.

prominence.name: Prominence
prominence.desc: Hurls a concentrated fire sphere. Massive magic damage.

prophecy_of_water.name: Prophecy of Water
prophecy_of_water.desc: Eva’s final blessing. Multiplies magic and physical power to colossal levels.

prophecy_of_wind.name: Prophecy of Wind
prophecy_of_wind.desc: Supreme buff: massively increases physical/magic attack speed.

puma_spirit_totem.name: Puma Spirit Totem
puma_spirit_totem.desc: Embodies the puma spirit, greatly increasing attack speed.

recharge.name: Recharge
recharge.desc: The famous mana battery. Restores 40% of max MP. (No MP cost!)

sand_bomb.name: Sand Bomb
sand_bomb.desc: Throws sand in the monster’s eyes, lowering accuracy and attack power.

seal_of_binding.name: Seal of Binding
seal_of_binding.desc: Tribal seal that chains the enemy to the ground.

seal_of_disease.name: Seal of Disease
seal_of_disease.desc: [Dominator Lvl 76] Supreme seal. Massive damage and weakness on all enemies.

seal_of_winter.name: Seal of Winter
seal_of_winter.desc: Seal that drastically lowers speed and strength.

seed_of_water.name: Seed of Water
seed_of_water.desc: Infuses your body with water power, massively increasing magic damage.

servitor_empowerment.name: Servitor Empowerment
servitor_empowerment.desc: Channels pure elemental energy, massively raising M. Atk.

servitor_heal.name: Servitor Heal
servitor_heal.desc: Channels magic to heal you and your servitor quickly.

servitor_physical_buff.name: Servitor Physical Buff
servitor_physical_buff.desc: Greatly boosts your servitor’s damage and Fury (and yours).

seven_arrow.name: Seven Arrow
seven_arrow.desc: Legendary technique: a hail of seven light arrows. Devastating damage.

seven_arrows.name: Seven Arrows
seven_arrows.desc: Supreme technique: fires 7 simultaneous arrows of pure hate.

shadow_flare.name: Shadow Flare
shadow_flare.desc: A blast of shadow under the enemy’s feet.

shadow_spark.name: Shadow Spark
shadow_spark.desc: Fires a sphere of pure darkness.

shield_of_faith.name: Shield of Faith
shield_of_faith.desc: Supreme power: makes the knight nearly immune to physical damage for 30s.

shield_stun.name: Shield Stun
shield_stun.desc: Brutal shield bash that stuns the target.

silent_move.name: Silent Move
silent_move.desc: Perfect camouflage. Monsters lose track of you.

sleeping_cloud.name: Sleeping Cloud
sleeping_cloud.desc: Magical mist that puts monsters to sleep — they lose sight of you.

solar_flare.name: Solar Flare
solar_flare.desc: Fires a burst of divine light that briefly blinds the target.

song_of_champion.name: Song of Champion
song_of_champion.desc: Supreme symphony: massive boost to all offensive stats.

song_of_earth.name: Song of Earth
song_of_earth.desc: Sings the song of earth, greatly raising P. Def. for 30s.

song_of_hunter.name: Song of Hunter
song_of_hunter.desc: Hunter’s song increases attack power and lethal precision.

song_of_wind.name: Song of Wind
song_of_wind.desc: Song of winds greatly increases attack speed.

spark_bolt.name: Spark Bolt
spark_bolt.desc: A quick arcane bolt. Solid early magic damage.

spoil.name: Spoil
spoil.desc: Secret greed magic. Marks the monster to try for extra materials on death.

spoil_crush.name: Spoil Crush
spoil_crush.desc: [Fortune Seeker Lvl 76] A crushing strike that applies Spoil and deals massive damage.

spoil_festival.name: Spoil Festival
spoil_festival.desc: [Bounty Hunter Lvl 40] Advanced Spoil. Marks the enemy and slightly weakens defense.

sprint.name: Sprint
sprint.desc: Greatly increases attack and movement speed.

steal_essence.name: Steal Essence
steal_essence.desc: Blood magic. Deals magic damage and heals 50% of damage dealt.

stun_shot.name: Stun Shot
stun_shot.desc: A heavy shot that stuns the target, stopping it from acting.

summon_aqua_cubic.name: Summon Aqua Cubic
summon_aqua_cubic.desc: Summons an autonomous water cubic that shoots ice at enemies.

summon_big_boom.name: Summon Big Boom
summon_big_boom.desc: [Warsmith Lvl 40] Summons a volatile powder golem that hits incredibly hard.

summon_feline_king.name: Summon Feline King
summon_feline_king.desc: Summons the Feline King — a giant beast with devastating claws.

summon_kai_the_cat.name: Summon Kai the Cat
summon_kai_the_cat.desc: Summons Kai the Cat — a swift, lethal magical feline that fights for you.

summon_magnus_the_unicorn.name: Summon Magnus the Unicorn
summon_magnus_the_unicorn.desc: Summons Magnus, King of Unicorns — magic attacks are devastating.

summon_mechanic_golem.name: Summon Mechanic Golem
summon_mechanic_golem.desc: Summons an iron-gear golem focused on physical attack and high defense.

summon_mirage_the_unicorn.name: Summon Mirage the Unicorn
summon_mirage_the_unicorn.desc: Summons the Mirage Unicorn to attack with magic bursts.

summon_panther.name: Summon Panther
summon_panther.desc: Summons the Black Panther to fight for you.

summon_siege_golem.name: Summon Siege Golem
summon_siege_golem.desc: [Maestro Lvl 76] Ultimate creation. Summons a colossal siege golem.

summon_silhouette.name: Summon Silhouette
summon_silhouette.desc: Summons a lethal twin-blade shadow to fight beside you for 2 minutes.

summon_spectral_lord.name: Summon Spectral Lord
summon_spectral_lord.desc: Summons the supreme Spectral Lord — devastating damage demon.

summon_storm_cubic.name: Summon Storm Cubic
summon_storm_cubic.desc: Summons a Storm Cubic that auto-fires lightning at the target.

summon_zombie.name: Summon Zombie
summon_zombie.desc: Raises an undead to fight beside you.

surrender_to_fire.name: Surrender To Fire
surrender_to_fire.desc: Shatters the target’s fire resistance, lowering M. Def.

surrender_to_water.name: Surrender To Water
surrender_to_water.desc: Shatters the monster’s resistance to water magic (breaks defense).

sweeper.name: Sweeper
sweeper.desc: Instantly collects bonus loot from a foe killed under Spoil.

sword_symphony.name: Sword Symphony
sword_symphony.desc: Channels blade energy into a sonic wave hitting all enemies.

symphony_of_blades.name: Symphony of Blades
symphony_of_blades.desc: Supreme technique: a blade tornado that shreds the enemy.

touch_of_death.name: Touch of Death
touch_of_death.desc: Supreme technique: lethal curse dealing massive dark damage.

trance.name: Trance
trance.desc: Puts the monster in a brief deep sleep, stopping attacks.

tribunal.name: Tribunal
tribunal.desc: Holy strike dealing high physical and magic damage together.

ultimate_defense.name: Ultimate Defense
ultimate_defense.desc: Wall stance: massively raises P. Def. for 30s.

ultimate_evasion.name: Ultimate Evasion
ultimate_evasion.desc: Supreme evasion. Nearly untouchable — doubles defense briefly.

vampiric_touch.name: Vampiric Touch
vampiric_touch.desc: Dark magic that drains the enemy’s life to heal you.

vicious_stance.name: Vicious Stance
vicious_stance.desc: Increases attack power and crit chance.

volcano.name: Volcano
volcano.desc: Summons a volcano under the enemy. Total fiery obliteration.

war_cry.name: War Cry
war_cry.desc: Intimidating battle cry that raises attack power.

whirlwind.name: Whirlwind
whirlwind.desc: Spins your weapon like a tornado, hitting all nearby enemies.

whirlwind_k.name: Whirlwind_K
whirlwind_k.desc: Spin your weapon, hitting ALL monsters.

wind_shackle.name: Wind Shackle
wind_shackle.desc: Wind chains slow movement and reduce the enemy’s strength.

wind_walk.name: Wind Walk
wind_walk.desc: Call the winds to increase your speed.

wrath.name: Wrath
wrath.desc: [Warsmith Lvl 40] Violently spins spear or axe, hitting all monsters.
